description: Intelligence Advanced — Career stage classifier, valuation engine, market intelligence, valuation UI

tasks.title: Career Stage Classifier
tasks.prompt:
Implement Career Stage Classifier (M4.4) in the Intelligence Service.

Add endpoints:
  POST /api/intel/career-stage/compute — classify user into one of 6 stages (Training/Entry, Junior/Associate, Acquisition/Launch, Growth, Mature, Pre-Exit) using deterministic rules from Vertical Config Pack. Inputs: registration date (tenure), co-location count, production volume, entity type, reputation signals. Output: stage, confidence level (high/medium/low), risk flags (retirement_risk, succession_risk, overextension, key_person_dependency), trigger signals. Store STAGE# items.
  GET /api/intel/career-stage — get current classification
  GET /api/intel/career-stage/history — history for tracking transitions

Risk flags stored as RISK# items in snapp-intel.

Integration tests: classify users at different tenures/configurations, verify correct stage assignment, verify risk flags trigger appropriately.
tasks.done_when: Career stage classifier works. 6 stages, risk flags, confidence levels. Tests pass.

tasks.title: Valuation Engine
tasks.prompt:
Implement the Valuation Engine (M4.5) in the Intelligence Service as specified in SNAPP-TRD.md WU-4.3.

Add endpoints:
  POST /api/intel/valuation/compute — three-case model (downside/base/upside). Revenue × EBITDA margin × Multiple, calibrated against benchmarks. Confidence score from data completeness. Driver identification from Vertical Config. Store VAL# items (CURRENT + SNAPSHOT). If valuation changed >5%, queue notification.
  GET /api/intel/valuation — current valuation with history
  POST /api/intel/valuation/scenario — same computation with user-provided overrides (not saved). For 'what if' modeling.

Integration tests: compute valuation from contributed data, verify three cases (downside < base < upside), verify scenario overrides produce different results, verify notification on significant change.
tasks.done_when: Valuation engine computes three-case model. Scenarios work. History tracked. Tests pass.

tasks.title: Market Intelligence Service
tasks.prompt:
Implement Market Intelligence (M4.6) in the Intelligence Service.

Add endpoints:
  GET /api/intel/market/{geoId} — market profile for a geography. Return: practitioner density, competitor count, consolidation pressure, demographic trends, workforce indicators. Computed from MKT# items in snapp-intel (seeded by enrichment layer later; for now, create test fixtures).
  GET /api/intel/market/compare?geos={geo1,geo2} — compare two markets side by side.

Create seed data fixture for 3-5 test markets so the UI has something to display.

Integration tests: retrieve market profile, compare two markets.
tasks.done_when: Market intelligence endpoints work with test fixture data. Tests pass.

tasks.title: Valuation and Intelligence Advanced UI
tasks.prompt:
Implement valuation UI (M4.9) and update dashboard with career stage and market intelligence.

1. Pages/Intelligence/Valuation.razor (/intelligence/valuation):
   - Three columns: MudPaper Downside | MudPaper **Base** (emphasized) | MudPaper Upside, large dollar values
   - MudChip confidence badge
   - Driver analysis: MudList of drivers, each with MudIcon impact level (high/medium/low), description, recommendation
   - Scenario modeling: MudSlider/MudNumericField for key driver overrides, MudButton 'Recalculate', shows delta ('This scenario → +$X base case')
   - History: MudChart Type=Line showing base case over time

2. Update Dashboard (/intelligence):
   - Career stage MudCard: stage name, MudChip confidence, risk flag MudAlerts if any
   - Risk flags MudCard: MudList of active flags with MudIcon Severity colors
   - Replace placeholders from S6

3. Pages/Intelligence/Market.razor (/intelligence/market):
   - MudAutocomplete for geography selection
   - MudCard with market metrics: density, competition, growth trend
   - MudButton 'Compare' → side-by-side MudTable

4. bUnit tests.
tasks.done_when: Valuation page with three-case display, drivers, scenarios, history chart. Career stage on dashboard. Market intelligence page. bUnit tests pass.

tasks.title: Sprint 7 integration validation
tasks.prompt: Validate Sprint 7. Run all tests. Walkthrough: view career stage classification, compute valuation, try scenario modeling, view market intelligence. Write .claude/reports/sprint-7-validation.md.
tasks.done_when: All tests pass. Full intelligence suite functional. Validation report written.
